list.sql: SELECT c.id, c.course_name, c.fee, c.duration, c.shift, c.teacher_id, t.name AS teacher_name FROM Courses c LEFT JOIN Teachers t ON t.id = c.teacher_id ORDER BY c.id

get.sql: SELECT id, course_name, fee, duration, shift, teacher_id FROM Courses WHERE id = %s

insert.sql: INSERT INTO Courses (id, course_name, fee, duration, shift, teacher_id) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)

update.sql: UPDATE Courses SET course_name = %s, fee = %s, duration = %s, shift = %s, teacher_id = %s WHERE id = %s

teachers_select.sql: SELECT id, name FROM Teachers ORDER BY name
